## Runtime.RuntimeContext.getJournalsForVersion() method

Gets all journal records for a specific recipe version.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getJournalsForVersion(versionId: RecipeVersionId): ReadonlyArray<IRecipeJournalRecord>;
```
